title: mariana eburnea
intro: Mariana eburnea, also known as the 'Coral Tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mariana eburnea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Mariana eburnea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
